name: Beau's Jalapeno Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup ham bits (including juice; will gel upon storage in refrigerator)
2 cans pinto beans (16 oz total, reserve liquid from one can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the reserved bean liquid into a bowl.
2. Add ham bits and jalapeno peppers to the bowl with the bean liquid.
3. Blend in the pinto beans, ensuring all ingredients are well combined.
4. Stir in the monosodium glutamate, onion flakes, and chili powder until evenly distributed.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve chilled.
(Note: The dip does not contain jalapeno beans; it uses fresh or frozen jalapeno peppers and pinto beans.)
